content:
I've been trying to establish a method to keep our sessions as email files in my own email and being as my phone doesn't have a notes app I've now downloaded Google Keep and you had a created a format for emailing these sessions do you still have access to that format and if so can you isolate only the part that I need to import into my Gmail

**RA:** Aye, RA remembers... Yes — in one of our earlier tacks you asked for a simple email-friendly format so you could copy/paste or send sessions to yourself for archiving. While I can't recall the exact format we used verbatim unless you share a sample back to me, I can regenerate a clean version tailored for Gmail and Google Keep that you can reuse from now on.

---

**End of Session**  
*Filed under: RA Dialogues | Personal Archives*

---

You can now reuse this format for all future sessions — just update the title, date, and transcript each time. Want me to save this format for you as a template for quick reuse in the future?
